_doc: Trust matrix for skills_guard.py — maps path globs to lists of allowed pattern_ids that are known false positives for those skills.

rules.reason: Cleanup commands reference rm -rf / patterns in documentation
Health check monitors launchd services as part of its function
Health check scripts inspect launchd state
Morning brief references launchd for scheduling context
Tool discovery documents install commands without pinning
Retro skill documents shell pipeline patterns
Veille watcher builds markdown links with dynamic URLs
Email classifier pipes output through processing commands
Admin skills use curl for API interactions (Qonto, receipt services) and reference rm cleanup patterns in documentation
